refs.description: NetworkX's Edmonds-Karp implementation, the BFS-based shortest-augmenting-path refinement of Ford-Fulkerson operating on a residual network.
NetworkX's public maximum_flow / minimum_cut API dispatches to Ford-Fulkerson-family solvers (edmonds_karp default).
SciPy's sparse graph maximum_flow routine implements augmenting-path max flow (Edmonds-Karp / Dinic) over residual capacities.
